ci:build.description: Build all crates in release mode

ci:lint.description: Check formatting and run Clippy with warnings as errors

ci:install-musl-tools.description: Install musl-tools (Linux only, required for *-linux-musl targets)

ci:build-target.description: Build the runfile binary in release mode for a specific target triple (--target=<triple>)

ci:package-archive.description: Package the built binary + README into a release archive (--target=<triple>). Produces stage/runfile-cli-<target>.{tar.xz|zip}.
commands: cp target/{{ ARGS.target }}/release/{{ VARS.executable }} stage/runfile-cli-{{ ARGS.target }}/

commands.then: cd stage && 7z a runfile-cli-{{ ARGS.target }}.zip runfile-cli-{{ ARGS.target }} > /dev/null
commands.else: cd stage && tar cJf runfile-cli-{{ ARGS.target }}.tar.xz runfile-cli-{{ ARGS.target }}

ci:stage-release-assets.description: Copy install scripts + JSON Schema into assets/ and generate sha256.sum

ci:create-release.description: Create the GitHub Release with all staged assets (--tag=<vX.Y.Z>). Requires GH_TOKEN and GITHUB_REPOSITORY in env.
ci:create-release.commands: gh release create "{{ ARGS.tag }}" --repo "{{ ENV.GITHUB_REPOSITORY }}" --title "{{ ARGS.tag }}" --generate-notes assets/*

ci:build-npm-packages.description: Build the per-platform npm packages from downloaded artifacts (--version=<X.Y.Z>, no leading v)

ci:publish-npm.description: Publish all per-platform npm packages, then the wrapper package. Requires NODE_AUTH_TOKEN in env.
commands: for dir in npm-dist/runfile-*; do (cd "$dir" && npm publish --access public --provenance) || exit 1; done
